inhabitant_vitality_formula_note: Final vitality multiplier = 1 + sum((inhabitant.vitality_multiplier - 1) * weight). Primary weight 1.0, secondary weight from secondary_inhabitant_numeric_weight.
inhabitant_defense_formula_note: Final defense modifier = sum(inhabitant.defense_modifier * weight). Round only after all modifiers are combined.
notes: Treat tier as the primary baseline power budget.
Inhabitant type defines identity, not the majority of combat math.
Chassis defines how the NPC fights.
Trait overlays modify encounter role after the base build is assembled.
Apply chassis attribute modifiers as flat shifts to the generated Body, Mind, and Will modifiers.
Caster chassis should place its dynamic bonus on the selected spellcasting attribute.
Primary inhabitant uses full numeric effect. Secondary uses secondary_inhabitant_numeric_weight.
Apply inhabitant vitality modifiers before chassis multipliers; sum defense modifiers before final rounding.
